news.title: LLM News Today (March 2026) – Open Source LLM Updates & AI Model Releases
news.snippet: A comprehensive guide to Google DeepMind's Gemini 3.1 Pro — the most advanced Pro-tier model as of February 2026, featuring a 1M-token context window, 77.1% on ARC-AGI-2, multimodal reasoning across text, images, audio, video, and code

tech.title: The Best AI Tools for 2026: A Practical, No-Hype Guide
tech.snippet: AI is no longer optional in modern careers. The real advantage in 2026 is not just using AI. It is knowing how to apply it meaningfully. Practice-Based Learning Tracks, Supercharged By A.I.
